V5.1.label: V5.1 framework evaluation layer
notes: Prepares framework for global + position blend testing

V5.2.label: V5.2 QB/WR blend-search framework
notes: QB best ranking blend: 55% global, 45% QB-specific
QB-only has best MAE/RMSE but blend has best Spearman
WR remains hold; global model still better on MAE/RMSE
Do not replace live V4 globally yet

V5.3.label: V5.3 multi-window framework
notes: Modern mature model improves in-sample Spearman but does not clearly beat long-history on holdout ranking
Recent 2014-2023 model is useful for early translation only because career AV is immature
Best long-history plus modern blend is too small to promote globally
Next step is V5.4 multi-target framework
